prompt: A gritty cyberpunk anime illustration of {argument name="character name" default="Miyamoto Iori"}, a {argument name="character age" default="19"}-year-old FPV drone racer, standing in three-quarter back view inside a vast ruined industrial racing arena at night. She has black hair tied in a messy high ponytail, pale skin, and wears a glossy black tactical flight suit covered in patches, straps, cables, and sponsor markings. A massive hard-shell backpack radio rig with long antennas and decals is mounted on her back, and an ID badge hangs from her waist. Her face is mostly hidden in profile and partially obscured, creating a mysterious mood. The environment is dense with steel beams, catwalks, hanging wires, broken windows, concrete pillars, wet reflective floors, and layered signage. Multiple FPV racing drones are actively flying through the arena, leaving bright curved light trails in white, cyan, and red that loop through the scene and guide the eye into depth. Include exactly 6 visible drones in the distance and midground. Add large weathered signs reading "SECTION C", "FREEDOM, SPEED, ONLY", and "LAP 07 KEEP FLYING", plus a vertical character info block in the upper left with the text "{argument name="nameplate text" default="MIYAMOTO IORI"}", "AGE: {argument name="age text" default="19"}", "FPV DRONE RACER", the Japanese quote "私は、飛ぶ者だ。" and the English line "I am the one who flies." Also include a short stat list reading "RANKING // 2", "WINS // 11", "PODIUMS // 23", and "STYLE // GHOST". On her suit and gear, show readable decals including "AXIS", "Fly Beyond", "BRX", "IORI 027", and an ID card labeled "PILOT MIYAMOTO IORI". Use a dark monochrome palette with steel gray, black, and muted brown, punctuated by neon racing trails and small white light sources. Cinematic backlighting, rain-soaked reflections, heavy texture, intricate linework, urban decay, high contrast, moody atmosphere, highly detailed anime-concept-art aesthetic, vertical poster composition.
translatedPrompt: 一张硬核赛博朋克动漫插画，主角是 {argument name="character name" default="宫本伊织"}，一位 {argument name="character age" default="19"} 岁的 FPV 无人机赛手。画面呈现她站在广阔且破败的夜间工业竞技场中，呈四分之三背影视角。她留着黑色乱发，扎成高马尾，皮肤白皙，身穿一件覆盖着补丁、绑带、线缆和赞助商标志的亮黑色战术飞行服。背上背着一个巨大的硬壳无线电背包，上面带有长天线和贴纸，腰间挂着一张 ID 证件。她的脸部大部分隐藏在侧影中，显得神秘莫测。环境布满了钢梁、猫道、悬垂的电线、破碎的窗户、混凝土柱、潮湿的反光地面以及层叠的标牌。多架 FPV 竞速无人机正在竞技场中穿梭，留下了白色、青色和红色的明亮弧形光迹，这些光迹在场景中盘旋，引导视线深入画面。画面中需包含 6 架清晰可见的无人机，分布在远景和中景。添加巨大的风化标牌，上面写着“SECTION C”、“FREEDOM, SPEED, ONLY”和“LAP 07 KEEP FLYING”，并在左上角添加一个垂直的角色信息块，文字包括“{argument name="nameplate text" default="MIYAMOTO IORI"}”、“AGE: {argument name="age text" default="19"}”、“FPV DRONE RACER”、日文引言“私は、飛ぶ者だ。”以及英文行“I am the one who flies.”。同时包含一个简短的数据列表，显示“RANKING // 2”、“WINS // 11”、“PODIUMS // 23”和“STYLE // GHOST”。在她的服装和装备上，展示清晰可见的贴纸，包括“AXIS”、“Fly Beyond”、“BRX”、“IORI 027”以及一张标有“PILOT MIYAMOTO IORI”的 ID 卡。使用以钢灰色、黑色和柔和棕色为主的暗色调，并点缀霓虹赛道光迹和微小的白色光源。电影级背光、雨水浸润的反光、厚重的质感、复杂的线条、城市衰败感、高对比度、忧郁的氛围，呈现出高度精细的动漫概念艺术美学，采用垂直海报构图。

breakdown.creativeCore: 赛博朋克 FPV 无人机赛手海报：一张细节丰富的暗黑风动漫赛博朋克角色海报，展示了一名在废弃工业竞技场中的年轻无人机赛手，非常适合作为科幻主视觉图或角色概念插画。
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；要求可读；包含标注/说明
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, anime]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: backlight, neon, high contrast]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；要求可读；包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
